name: @engram/contracts
description: TypeScript projections of the accepted Engram contracts.

scripts.generate: python3 ../../scripts/generate_ts_contracts.py && json2ts -i src/generated/types.schema.generated.json -o src/generated/types.generated.ts --bannerComment "/* Generated from contracts/v1/schemas/engram-v1.schema.json. Do not edit. */"
